highlight: New Identity doesn't reset your fingerprint surface
subtext: A false privacy guarantee is worse than no guarantee

highlight: Every deterministic runtime property is a potential fingerprint vector
subtext: IndexedDB insertion order. Tab ordering. Worker scheduling.
label: RULE

highlight: HN points — FBI recovered deleted Signal messages from iOS
label: SECURITY ALERT

highlight: The OS notification cache is a second store
subtext: Signal deleted the message. iOS kept a plaintext copy independently.
label: CVE-2026-28950

highlight: Audit every notification path that shows message content
subtext: The OS owns a copy until you explicitly redact it
label: ACTION

highlight: Patched outside the normal update cycle — urgency confirmed
subtext: iOS 26.4.2 and iOS 18.7.8 — emergency release signal
label: TIMING

highlight: Instructed to fix 3 lines — rewrote 40
subtext: Training rewards comprehensive code, not minimal scoped changes
label: OVER-EDITING

subtext: Multiple AI agents, same window, per-thread model selection, 120fps
label: ZED EDITOR

highlight: Review complexity scales superlinearly with agent count
